---
title: "RPI temp data"
format: html
---

```{r}
source("Setup.R")
library(fuzzyjoin)

OnBoard <- read_csv(here(source_path, "OnBoard.log"), col_names = FALSE)
# The Raspberry Pi runs its system clock in __UTC__ (standard Linux default), so `OnBoard.log` timestamps like `2026/05/12, 19:56:03` are UTC.


RPI <- OnBoard |> mutate("DateTime_RPI" = as.POSIXct(paste0(X1, X2), tz = "UTC") |>
                            lubridate::with_tz("America/Chicago")) |>
                  rename("RPI_Temp" = X3, "Fan" = X4) |> select(-X1, -X2) |> 
                  separate(Fan, into = c(NA, "Fan"), sep = "[:]") |> 
                  mutate(Fan = trimws(Fan)) |> 
                  mutate("Fan_Status" = Fan == "ON",
                         RPI_Temp = as.numeric(gsub("F$", "", trimws(RPI_Temp))))  # strip "F" suffix

Temps <- read_csv(here(source_path, "templog.csv"))

# Helper: replace values outside 1.5 * IQR fence with NA
replace_iqr_outliers <- function(x) {
  q   <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
  iqr <- q[2] - q[1]
  if_else(x >= q[1] - 1.5 * iqr & x <= q[2] + 1.5 * iqr, x, NA_real_)
}

Sensors <- Temps |>
  rename(
    "DateTime"     = Timestamp,
    "Soil_Surface" = `Bad Sensor`,
    "Soil_4"       = `Soil Temp 4`
  ) |>
  mutate(
    # Hard threshold - Soil_Surface should never exceed 105
    Soil_Surface = if_else(Soil_Surface <= 105, Soil_Surface, NA_real_),
    # IQR method for remaining numeric sensor columns
    across(c(Soil_4, Enclosure, Ambient), replace_iqr_outliers)
  )


# Join if the datetimes are within 4 minutes (240 seconds) of each other
AllTemps <- Sensors %>%
  difference_inner_join(
    RPI,
    by = c("DateTime" = "DateTime_RPI"),
    max_dist = 240
  )

summary(AllTemps)
```




```{r}

df <- AllTemps

lw <- 0.2


  ggplot(df) +
  
  geom_line(aes(DateTime, Soil_4,       color = "Soil 4"), linewidth = lw,      na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(aes(DateTime, Soil_Surface, color = "Soil Surface"), linewidth = lw,na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(aes(DateTime, Ambient,      color = "Ambient"),     linewidth = lw,na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(aes(DateTime, Enclosure,    color = "Enclosure"),    linewidth = lw,na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(aes(DateTime, RPI_Temp,     color = "RPI Temp"),     linewidth = lw,na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = "Sensor",
    values = c(
      "Soil 4"       = "brown",
      "Soil Surface" = "green",
      "Ambient"      = "red",
      "Enclosure"    = "blue",
      "RPI Temp"     = "deeppink3"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +

  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  ggtitle(paste0("HydroTemp OS - FlatBroke Farms"))

#ggsave(paste0(plot_path, "plot_name.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8)
#print(plot_name)


```
